summary.en: Building Nova, a 100% reusable rocket for affordable, on-demand access to and from orbit.
summary.zh: 打造 Nova,一款 100% 可重複使用的火箭,提供平價、隨需的進出軌道服務。

highlight.en: Its fully reusable upper-stage vehicle aims to cut the cost to orbit roughly 20x while enabling on-demand access to any orbit, including asset capture and return.
highlight.zh: 其完全可重複使用的上面級飛行器目標將入軌成本降低約 20 倍,並支援隨需進入任何軌道,包括資產捕獲與回收。

summary.en: Telehealth dietitians covered by health insurance.
summary.zh: 由健康保險給付的遠距醫療營養師服務。

highlight.en: Nourish connects patients with chronic conditions to Registered Dietitians via telehealth and gets the visits covered by their insurance, tackling diet-driven healthcare costs.
highlight.zh: Nourish 透過遠距醫療將慢性病患者與註冊營養師連結,並由保險給付看診費用,從飲食面切入解決醫療成本問題。

summary.en: Internet for the urban developing world.
summary.zh: 為發展中地區的城市提供網路服務。

highlight.en: Somos uses unlicensed-spectrum radio technology to rapidly build fiber-quality 1Gbps networks across cities in the developing world.
highlight.zh: Somos 運用免授權頻譜的無線電技術,在發展中地區城市快速建置媲美光纖的 1Gbps 網路。

summary.en: Marketplace where restaurants in Africa buy food supplies.
summary.zh: 非洲餐廳採購食材供應的線上市集。

highlight.en: Vendease lets African restaurants order directly from farms and food manufacturers, cutting out costly middlemen and delivering supplies within 24 hours.
highlight.zh: Vendease 讓非洲餐廳直接向農場與食品製造商下單,省去昂貴的中間商,並在 24 小時內送達食材。

summary.en: Challenger bank for consumers in French-speaking Africa.
summary.zh: 為法語非洲消費者打造的新型態數位銀行。

highlight.en: Djamo targets French-speaking Africa, where under 25% of people are banked, building affordable banking to bring millions into financial inclusion.
highlight.zh: Djamo 鎖定銀行普及率不到 25% 的法語非洲市場,打造平價銀行服務,將數百萬人納入金融體系。

summary.en: Effective and accessible live online education.
summary.zh: 有效且平價的線上即時教育。

highlight.en: Coderhouse runs 100-person live classes with one professor and a mentor per 15 students, pairing graded assignments with career services to keep churn under 9%.
highlight.zh: Coderhouse 開設 100 人即時課程,每 15 名學生配一位導師,搭配作業批改與職涯服務,將流失率控制在 9% 以下。

summary.en: Create and sell online courses in Brazil.
summary.zh: 在巴西建立並銷售線上課程的平台。

highlight.en: Kiwify gives Brazilian creators the tools to sell online courses, bundling payment processing, video streaming, and student management in one platform.
highlight.zh: Kiwify 為巴西創作者提供銷售線上課程的工具,將金流處理、影音串流與學員管理整合於單一平台。

summary.en: AI-native cybersecurity platform unifying detection, protection, and remediation.
summary.zh: 以 AI 為核心的資安平台,整合偵測、防護與修復。

highlight.en: Cyble reimagines cybersecurity with an AI-native platform spanning the digital attack surface, operating globally from Georgia with offices across Asia and the Middle East.
highlight.zh: Cyble 以 AI 原生平台重新定義資安,涵蓋數位攻擊面,總部位於喬治亞州,並在亞洲與中東設有據點。

summary.en: Simplifying hiring and payments for the global workforce.
summary.zh: 簡化全球人力的招聘與薪資支付。

highlight.en: Ontop lets companies hire international workers and gives those workers access to USD accounts, smoothing cross-border employment and payments.
highlight.zh: Ontop 讓企業聘用國際員工,並提供這些員工美元帳戶,簡化跨境聘僱與薪資支付。

summary.en: Online language school for Latam with instructor-led group classes.
summary.zh: 為拉美打造的線上語言學校,提供由教師帶領的小組課程。

highlight.en: Poliglota runs small, same-level group sessions led by trained language coaches using its social methodology, with over 12,000 paying students learning English.
highlight.zh: Poliglota 由受訓語言教練以其社群式教學法帶領同程度小組課程,已有超過 1.2 萬名付費學員學習英語。

summary.en: Amazon-style logistics for e-commerce companies in Latam.
summary.zh: 為拉美電商打造的亞馬遜式物流服務。

highlight.en: clicOH built one of LatAm's largest logistics networks to store, pack, and ship same-day and next-day for e-commerce companies across the region.
highlight.zh: clicOH 建立了拉美最大的物流網路之一,為區域內電商提供倉儲、揀貨及當日與隔日配送服務。

summary.en: The data layer for physical AI.
summary.zh: 實體 AI 的資料層。

highlight.en: Encord helps AI teams turn messy multimodal data into production systems for robots, autonomous vehicles, and smart infrastructure, used by 300+ teams including Toyota and Skydio.
highlight.zh: Encord 協助 AI 團隊將雜亂的多模態資料轉化為機器人、自駕車與智慧基礎設施的量產系統,Toyota、Skydio 等 300 多個團隊採用。

summary.en: Underwriting and insurance for house rentals in Latam.
summary.zh: 為拉美住宅租賃提供承保與保險。

highlight.en: Morada Uno screens, collects, and insures residential leases, letting brokers and landlords close deals without tenants needing a property-owning guarantor.
highlight.zh: Morada Uno 篩選、收款並承保住宅租約,讓房仲與房東能成交,租客也無須提供持有房產的擔保人。

summary.en: The operating system for embedded telecom.
summary.zh: 嵌入式電信的作業系統。

highlight.en: Gigs bridges telecom carriers and digital platforms to power embedded mobile connectivity for large enterprises, backed by Ribbit Capital and Google's Gradient Ventures.
highlight.zh: Gigs 串接電信業者與數位平台,為大型企業提供嵌入式行動連線,由 Ribbit Capital 與 Google 的 Gradient Ventures 支持。

summary.en: The logistics operating system for e-commerce in LatAm.
summary.zh: 拉美電商的物流作業系統。

highlight.en: Estoca is a cloud logistics platform using AI to optimize fulfillment, warehousing, and last-mile for D2C brands, processing more packages per square meter, hour, and person.
highlight.zh: Estoca 是運用 AI 的雲端物流平台,為 D2C 品牌優化履約、倉儲與末端配送,提升每平方公尺、每小時與每人的處理量。

summary.en: Helping US tech companies hire and manage software engineers in LATAM.
summary.zh: 協助美國科技公司在拉美聘用與管理軟體工程師。

highlight.en: Howdy taps its deep ties in Latin America's tech community to source engineers in US time zones, serving over 200 companies including Coinbase and Vanta.
highlight.zh: Howdy 憑藉在拉美科技社群的深厚連結,招募與美國同時區的工程師,服務 Coinbase、Vanta 等超過 200 家公司。

summary.en: AI-native FP&A platform that helps finance teams drive the business.
summary.zh: 以 AI 為核心的 FP&A 平台,協助財務團隊推動業務。

highlight.en: Abacum unifies operational and financial metrics so finance teams can surface insights, automate reporting, forecast revenue, and run scenarios, used by CoreWeave, Strava, and Replit.
highlight.zh: Abacum 整合營運與財務指標,讓財務團隊能挖掘洞察、自動化報表、預測營收並執行情境分析,CoreWeave、Strava、Replit 等公司採用。

summary.en: Protecting the grid today and preparing it for tomorrow.
summary.zh: 守護今日電網,並為未來電網做好準備。

highlight.en: Gridware builds smart sensors that let utilities instantly detect, locate, and fix grid outages, helping prevent wildfires and other disasters before they happen.
highlight.zh: Gridware 打造智慧感測器,讓電力公司即時偵測、定位並修復電網故障,在野火等災害發生前加以預防。

summary.en: Your one-stop shop to eat well in Brazil.
summary.zh: 在巴西吃得健康的一站式平台。

highlight.en: Trela is an end-to-end marketplace connecting healthy-grocery suppliers directly to customers' homes at the lowest prices.
highlight.zh: Trela 是端到端市集,將健康食材供應商直接連結到顧客家中,並以最低價格供應。

summary.en: The fastest path from insurance submission to better underwriting decisions.
summary.zh: 從保險投件到更佳核保決策的最快路徑。

highlight.en: Pibit.ai's CURE platform uses agentic AI to automate intake, triage, and data enrichment for commercial underwriting, serving carriers and MGAs across the US.
highlight.zh: Pibit.ai 的 CURE 平台運用代理式 AI 自動化商業核保的收件、分流與資料增補,服務全美保險公司與 MGA。

summary.en: Tools and infrastructure to build and scale blockchain applications.
summary.zh: 建構並擴展區塊鏈應用的工具與基礎設施。

highlight.en: Quicknode gives developers fast, reliable access to 80+ chains plus real-time and historical data, automation tools, and a unified API suite for onchain apps.
highlight.zh: Quicknode 讓開發者快速可靠地存取 80 多條鏈,並提供即時與歷史資料、自動化工具及統一 API 套件,用於鏈上應用。

summary.en: An all-in-one operating system for telcos.
summary.zh: 電信業者的一體化作業系統。

highlight.en: gaiia provides telecom operators with a single all-in-one operating system to run their business.
highlight.zh: gaiia 為電信業者提供單一的一體化作業系統來經營業務。

summary.en: App for independent agents to sell financial products in India.
summary.zh: 讓獨立業務員在印度銷售金融產品的應用程式。

highlight.en: GroMo's social-commerce platform equips 1.2 million agents to distribute 100+ financial products and bridge the financial-literacy gap for Indian consumers.
highlight.zh: GroMo 的社群電商平台讓 120 萬名業務員銷售 100 多種金融產品,並為印度消費者彌補金融知識落差。

summary.en: Frontend platform for eCommerce.
summary.zh: 電商的前端平台。

highlight.en: Alokai is a Frontend-as-a-Service for composable commerce, connecting the technologies needed to build fast, scalable storefronts, powering 3000+ live stores worldwide.
highlight.zh: Alokai 是組合式商務的前端即服務,串接打造快速可擴展店面所需的技術,支援全球 3000 多家上線商店。

summary.en: A flexible AI meeting notetaker.
summary.zh: 靈活的 AI 會議筆記工具。

highlight.en: Fathom captures meetings bot or bot-free on any call, answers questions across your meeting history with citations, and connects to Claude, ChatGPT, and your CRM.
highlight.zh: Fathom 可在任何通話中以機器人或無機器人方式記錄會議,跨會議歷史回答問題並附引用,並可連接 Claude、ChatGPT 與你的 CRM。

summary.en: AI-powered justice intelligence platform that brings legal violations to light.
summary.zh: 以 AI 驅動的司法情報平台,揭發法律違規事件。

highlight.en: Darrow scans real-world data with generative AI to detect harmful events, estimate victims and case value, and match plaintiff's lawyers to their next big case.
highlight.zh: Darrow 以生成式 AI 掃描真實世界資料,偵測有害事件、評估受害人數與案件價值,並為原告律師媒合下一個大案。

summary.en: Building the next generation AI creative studio.
summary.zh: 打造下一代 AI 創意工作室。

highlight.en: Moonvalley is building a creative studio powered by capable video and image foundation models, backed by Y Combinator and Khosla Ventures.
highlight.zh: Moonvalley 以強大的影片與影像基礎模型打造創意工作室,由 Y Combinator 與 Khosla Ventures 支持。

summary.en: Game-based exercise machines that transform workouts into entertainment.
summary.zh: 以遊戲為基礎的健身器材,將運動轉化為娛樂。

highlight.en: Aviron's connected exercise machines run an immersive gaming platform, using game psychology and content to keep its fitness community motivated.
highlight.zh: Aviron 的連網健身器材搭載沉浸式遊戲平台,運用遊戲心理學與內容維持健身社群的動力。

summary.en: Admin automation for healthcare.
summary.zh: 醫療領域的行政自動化。

highlight.en: Camber builds software that automates manual administrative work for behavioral-health clinicians so they can focus on care, backed by a16z and Y Combinator.
highlight.zh: Camber 打造軟體自動化行為健康臨床人員的手動行政工作,讓他們專注於照護,由 a16z 與 Y Combinator 支持。

summary.en: Employer-backed payroll advances for employees in Egypt.
summary.zh: 在埃及由雇主提供的員工薪資預支服務。

highlight.en: NowPay is a financial-wellness platform letting employees in emerging markets draw salary in advance and pay bills instantly, backed by 500 Startups and Beco Capital.
highlight.zh: NowPay 是財務健康平台,讓新興市場員工隨時預支薪資並即時繳費,由 500 Startups 與 Beco Capital 支持。

summary.en: Letting consumers split the cost of purchases without a credit card.
summary.zh: 讓消費者無需信用卡即可分期付款。

highlight.en: Atrato enables merchants and consumers to offer flexible installment payments at the point of sale, no credit card required.
highlight.zh: Atrato 讓商家與消費者在結帳時提供彈性分期付款,無須信用卡。

summary.en: Software to run car washes on a monthly subscription model.
summary.zh: 以月費訂閱模式經營洗車場的軟體。

highlight.en: Rinsed gives car washes the software to run and grow their monthly subscription memberships.
highlight.zh: Rinsed 為洗車場提供經營與成長月費訂閱會員的軟體。

summary.en: The new wealth manager for Europe.
summary.zh: 歐洲的新型財富管理工具。

highlight.en: Finary empowers retail investors to track, manage, and invest their money across assets in a single app.
highlight.zh: Finary 讓散戶投資人在單一應用程式中追蹤、管理並投資跨資產的財富。

summary.en: Digital bank for teenagers in LatAm with a linked prepaid card.
summary.zh: 為拉美青少年打造、搭配預付卡的數位銀行。

highlight.en: Z1's app and prepaid card help teenagers and young adults learn to manage and spend money and receive earnings, starting their road to financial independence.
highlight.zh: Z1 的應用程式與預付卡幫助青少年與青年學習管理及花用金錢、收取收入,踏上財務獨立之路。

summary.en: Canada's digital health clinic for men.
summary.zh: 加拿大專為男性打造的數位健康診所。

highlight.en: Phoenix is a digital healthcare platform improving men's relationship with their health, handling everything from diagnosis to delivery in Canada.
highlight.zh: Phoenix 是數位醫療平台,改善男性與自身健康的關係,在加拿大從診斷到送藥一手包辦。

summary.en: Banking for businesses.
summary.zh: 為企業打造的銀行服務。

highlight.en: Prospa provides banking services built specifically for businesses.
highlight.zh: Prospa 提供專為企業打造的銀行服務。

summary.en: The one-stop shop for auto-parts in Mexico.
summary.zh: 墨西哥汽車零件的一站式採購平台。

highlight.en: Meru is a platform optimizing the automotive aftermarket supply chain for mechanics across Latin America.
highlight.zh: Meru 是為拉美技師優化汽車售後零件供應鏈的平台。

summary.en: Rocket Mortgage for LatAm.
summary.zh: 拉美版的 Rocket Mortgage 房貸平台。

highlight.en: Kredi brings a Rocket Mortgage-style online home-loan experience to Latin America.
highlight.zh: Kredi 將 Rocket Mortgage 式的線上房貸體驗帶到拉丁美洲。

summary.en: Software-orchestrated mass production of plastics.
summary.zh: 以軟體統籌的塑膠量產。

highlight.en: Atomic is a vertically integrated plastics supplier that uses AI to design and build optimal molds for each part geometry, moving into production faster than existing supply chains.
highlight.zh: Atomic 是垂直整合的塑膠供應商,運用 AI 為每種零件幾何設計並製造最佳模具,比既有供應鏈更快進入量產。

summary.en: Software for pharmacies to move beyond dispensing.
summary.zh: 讓藥局超越配藥業務的軟體。

highlight.en: MedMe lets pharmacies schedule, deliver, and document paid clinical services like prescribing, testing, and vaccinations, raising service-delivery efficiency 10x.
highlight.zh: MedMe 讓藥局排程、提供並記錄開藥、檢測與接種等付費臨床服務,將服務交付效率提升 10 倍。

summary.en: Account-to-account payments in Mexico and Chile.
summary.zh: 墨西哥與智利的帳戶對帳戶付款服務。

highlight.en: Fintoc powers direct account-to-account payments across Mexico and Chile.
highlight.zh: Fintoc 在墨西哥與智利提供直接的帳戶對帳戶付款。

summary.en: AI document understanding API.
summary.zh: AI 文件理解 API。

highlight.en: Mindee offers a self-service platform where builders train their own document-understanding models, plus pre-built use cases for accounting, AP automation, and KYC.
highlight.zh: Mindee 提供讓開發者自行訓練文件理解模型的自助平台,並備有會計、應付帳款自動化與 KYC 等現成使用案例。

summary.en: A complete in-person go-to-market platform.
summary.zh: 完整的線下面對面 GTM 平台。

highlight.en: Popl helps companies capture leads, scan badges, enrich data, and sync to their CRM at events, turning in-person conferences into a measurable growth channel.
highlight.zh: Popl 協助企業在活動現場擷取潛在客戶、掃描識別證、增補資料並同步到 CRM,將線下會議轉化為可衡量的成長管道。

summary.en: Leading online after-school for kids and teens to learn AI and coding.
summary.zh: 領先的線上課後班,讓兒童與青少年學習 AI 與程式設計。

highlight.en: Codingal offers live, personalized AI and coding classes for K-12 students with vetted CS-background instructors and a STEM.org-accredited curriculum.
highlight.zh: Codingal 為 K-12 學生提供即時、個人化的 AI 與程式課程,師資皆具資工背景並經審核,課綱獲 STEM.org 認證。

summary.en: A one-stop shop for healthy products.
summary.zh: 健康商品的一站式商店。

highlight.en: FitHub is an online supermarket in Colombia for healthy, eco-friendly products, positioned as the Good Eggs of LATAM.
highlight.zh: FitHub 是哥倫比亞主打健康環保商品的線上超市,定位為拉美版的 Good Eggs。

summary.en: Software and AI tools for SMBs in the US and Latin America.
summary.zh: 為美國與拉美中小企業打造的軟體與 AI 工具。

highlight.en: Treinta powers 7 million SMBs across the US and Latin America with simple finance, inventory, and sales tools.
highlight.zh: Treinta 以簡單的財務、庫存與銷售工具,服務全美與拉美的 700 萬家中小企業。

summary.en: Modernizing commercial insurance.
summary.zh: 革新商業保險。

highlight.en: Shepherd is modernizing how commercial insurance is delivered.
highlight.zh: Shepherd 正在革新商業保險的提供方式。

summary.en: Operating system for hotels and vacation rentals.
summary.zh: 飯店與度假租賃的作業系統。

highlight.en: Stayflexi automates hotel and rental operations and boosts revenue from unsold rooms and amenities, used by over 3,000 hotels in 16 countries.
highlight.zh: Stayflexi 自動化飯店與租賃營運,並從未售出的客房與設施增加營收,已有 16 國逾 3000 家飯店採用。

summary.en: The lightest electric aircraft motors in the world.
summary.zh: 全球最輕的電動飛機馬達。

highlight.en: H3X's first product packs a 250-kW integrated motor, inverter, and gearbox into an 18 kg unit to enable large-scale aircraft electrification.
highlight.zh: H3X 的首款產品將 250 千瓦馬達、變頻器與齒輪箱整合於 18 公斤的單元中,推動大規模飛機電動化。

summary.en: A digital wallet for the Middle East and North Africa.
summary.zh: 為中東與北非打造的數位錢包。

highlight.en: Ziina is bringing a next-generation digital wallet and financial services to the Middle East.
highlight.zh: Ziina 為中東帶來下一代數位錢包與金融服務。

summary.en: General autonomy for controlled spaces.
summary.zh: 為封閉場域打造的通用自主駕駛技術。

highlight.en: Flux Auto builds autonomous mobility tech to fully automate vehicle operation in controlled spaces like warehouses, farms, and mines, cutting reliance on human drivers.
highlight.zh: Flux Auto 打造自主移動技術,在倉庫、農場與礦場等封閉場域全面自動化車輛操作,降低對人力駕駛的依賴。

summary.en: Full-stack Very Low Earth Orbit satellite missions.
summary.zh: 全端式極低地球軌道衛星任務。

highlight.en: Albedo operates satellites in Very Low Earth Orbit, flying closer to Earth for sharper imagery, faster comms, and real-time maneuverability with the only flight-proven VLEO system.
highlight.zh: Albedo 在極低地球軌道運行衛星,飛得更接近地球以獲得更銳利影像、更快通訊與即時機動性,並擁有唯一經飛行驗證的 VLEO 系統。

summary.en: Embedded lending infrastructure for software companies.
summary.zh: 為軟體公司打造的嵌入式借貸基礎設施。

highlight.en: Lendflow helps software companies embed lending so their customers can access capital, boosting product engagement, retention, and revenue per user.
highlight.zh: Lendflow 協助軟體公司嵌入借貸服務,讓客戶取得資金,進而提升產品互動、留存率與每用戶營收。

summary.en: Application development platform for native mobile and web apps.
summary.zh: 原生行動與網頁應用的開發平台。

highlight.en: FlutterFlow is a visual app-development platform used by banking, telecom, and manufacturing leaders, with over 1.3M users across 200+ countries and regions.
highlight.zh: FlutterFlow 是視覺化應用開發平台,獲銀行、電信與製造業龍頭採用,在 200 多個國家與地區擁有逾 130 萬名使用者。

summary.en: The unified AI-ERP and FP&A platform.
summary.zh: 統一的 AI-ERP 與 FP&A 平台。

highlight.en: LiveFlow aims to replace the fragmented legacy finance stack with one intelligent system, eliminating manual work for accounting and finance teams at 6,000+ businesses.
highlight.zh: LiveFlow 力圖以單一智慧系統取代零碎的傳統財務工具,為逾 6000 家企業的會計與財務團隊消除手動作業。

summary.en: The all-in-one startup operating system.
summary.zh: 一體化的新創營運系統。

highlight.en: Firstbase brings incorporation, compliance, bookkeeping, and taxes together in one place for startups.
highlight.zh: Firstbase 為新創將公司設立、合規、記帳與報稅整合於同一處。

summary.en: Voice AI for developers.
summary.zh: 為開發者打造的語音 AI。

highlight.en: Vapi gives developers the tools to build voice AI applications.
highlight.zh: Vapi 為開發者提供打造語音 AI 應用的工具。

summary.en: Equity management platform for startups and investors.
summary.zh: 為新創與投資人打造的股權管理平台。

highlight.en: Founded by ex-VCs, Quotabook lets founders manage cap tables and run simulations, motivates employees with stock options, and lets investors track portfolios automatically.
highlight.zh: Quotabook 由前創投人士創立,讓創辦人管理股權表並執行模擬,以股票選擇權激勵員工,並讓投資人自動追蹤投資組合。

summary.en: AI tax workflow platform for accounting firms.
summary.zh: 為會計事務所打造的 AI 稅務工作流程平台。

highlight.en: Soraban is an AI-native tax workflow platform spanning from client request to delivery, built to serve tens of thousands of accounting firms over the long term.
highlight.zh: Soraban 是 AI 原生的稅務工作流程平台,涵蓋從客戶請求到交付的全程,志在長期服務數萬家會計事務所。

summary.en: Shopify for beauty and wellness businesses in Latam.
summary.zh: 拉美美容與健康事業的 Shopify。

highlight.en: AgendaPro lets beauty and wellness business owners in Latam charge customers online and easily schedule appointments.
highlight.zh: AgendaPro 讓拉美的美容與健康業者線上向顧客收費並輕鬆排程預約。

summary.en: AI-driven online tech school for busy professionals.
summary.zh: 為忙碌專業人士打造的 AI 驅動線上科技學校。

highlight.en: Turing College upskills and reskills working professionals in data science, AI, analytics, and programming in 3-12 months with 1-on-1 support.
highlight.zh: Turing College 在 3 至 12 個月內,以一對一支援為在職專業人士提供資料科學、AI、分析與程式的進修與轉職培訓。

summary.en: AI agents for oncology EHRs.
summary.zh: 為腫瘤科電子病歷打造的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Triomics embeds task-driven AI agents into oncology workflows to process unstructured records at scale, trusted by 4 of the top 10 US cancer hospitals.
highlight.zh: Triomics 將任務導向的 AI 代理嵌入腫瘤科工作流程,大規模處理非結構化病歷,獲全美前十大癌症醫院中的 4 家採用。

summary.en: AI-powered HRIS for high-performing teams.
summary.zh: 為高效團隊打造、以 AI 驅動的人資資訊系統。

highlight.en: Humaans is a next-gen HRIS for distributed organizations that cuts ongoing admin work by 65% and onboarding time by 55% via a flexible data model and deep integrations.
highlight.zh: Humaans 是為分散式組織打造的新世代人資系統,透過彈性資料模型與深度整合,將日常行政工作減少 65%、入職時間縮短 55%。

summary.en: Commission-free stock and crypto trading app with no minimums.
summary.zh: 零佣金、無最低門檻的股票與加密貨幣交易應用。

highlight.en: Hapi lets anyone in Latin America invest in stocks, ETFs, and cryptos in under five minutes with no minimums and no commissions.
highlight.zh: Hapi 讓拉美的任何人在五分鐘內投資股票、ETF 與加密貨幣,無最低門檻、無佣金。

summary.en: Corporate card and spend management platform for Indian startups.
summary.zh: 為印度新創打造的企業卡與支出管理平台。

highlight.en: Kodo gives Indian startups a corporate card paired with a spend-management platform.
highlight.zh: Kodo 為印度新創提供企業卡並搭配支出管理平台。

summary.en: Better business insurance for MSMEs in India (now part of InsuranceDekho).
summary.zh: 為印度微中小企業打造的商業保險(現為 InsuranceDekho 一部分)。

highlight.en: Verak offered next-day coverage from ₹8/day against 15+ perils, working across the value chain from satellite-based underwriting to WhatsApp claims, before joining InsuranceDekho.
highlight.zh: Verak 提供每日 8 盧比起、隔日生效、涵蓋 15 種以上災害的保障,從衛星核保到 WhatsApp 理賠橫跨整條價值鏈,後併入 InsuranceDekho。

summary.en: Carbon capture for vehicles.
summary.zh: 為車輛打造的碳捕捉技術。

highlight.en: Remora captures up to 90% of CO2 from train and truck exhaust to purify and sell, and has partnered with Union Pacific, Norfolk Southern, Ryder, and Werner.
highlight.zh: Remora 可捕捉火車與卡車廢氣中高達 90% 的二氧化碳加以純化銷售,並與 Union Pacific、Norfolk Southern、Ryder 與 Werner 合作。

summary.en: Real-time audio and video SDKs, ready to launch.
summary.zh: 可立即上線的即時音訊與視訊 SDK。

highlight.en: Dyte lets developers integrate live video calls into their apps with less than 10 lines of code.
highlight.zh: Dyte 讓開發者以不到 10 行程式碼將即時視訊通話整合進應用程式。

summary.en: Thick, juicy, marbled plant-based steaks.
summary.zh: 厚實多汁、帶油花的植物肉牛排。

highlight.en: Juicy Marbles uses proprietary protein-texturing technology to produce plant-based whole cuts, aiming to match meat on taste, price, and convenience and halve meat consumption by 2030.
highlight.zh: Juicy Marbles 以專利蛋白質紋理技術製作植物性整塊肉排,目標在口感、價格與便利性上比肩真肉,並於 2030 年前將肉類消費減半。

summary.en: The fastest and easiest way to make home upgrades.
summary.zh: 進行居家升級最快、最簡單的方式。

highlight.en: HomeBreeze's AI remotely scopes home projects from photos and video, sending them to a contractor network to get homeowners quotes within minutes, starting with energy-efficient upgrades.
highlight.zh: HomeBreeze 的 AI 從照片與影片遠端評估居家工程,送交承包商網路,在數分鐘內為屋主報價,並從節能升級切入。

summary.en: User research on autopilot.
summary.zh: 自動化運作的使用者研究。

highlight.en: Great Question automates customer research from recruiting and scheduling to surveys and prototype tests, used by Adidas Runtastic, O'Reilly Media, and MainStreet.
highlight.zh: Great Question 自動化從招募、排程到問卷與原型測試的客戶研究,Adidas Runtastic、O'Reilly Media 與 MainStreet 等皆採用。

summary.en: Multi-agent orchestration platform.
summary.zh: 多代理協作編排平台。

highlight.en: AXAR AI provides a platform for orchestrating multiple AI agents.
highlight.zh: AXAR AI 提供協作編排多個 AI 代理的平台。

summary.en: Platform for bus travel across Indian cities.
summary.zh: 連接印度城市的巴士出行平台。

highlight.en: Zingbus runs safe, affordable intercity bus services by aggregating small operators and optimizing their schedules and pricing to raise their revenue.
highlight.zh: Zingbus 透過整合小型業者並優化其班次與定價來提升營收,提供安全平價的城際巴士服務。

summary.en: An API for electric vehicles and other energy hardware.
summary.zh: 連接電動車與其他能源硬體的 API。

highlight.en: Enode's APIs let apps instantly connect users' energy devices, including EVs, solar inverters, home batteries, and thermostats.
highlight.zh: Enode 的 API 讓應用程式即時連接使用者的能源裝置,包括電動車、太陽能逆變器、家用電池與恆溫器。

summary.en: Marketing automation platform for selling to local businesses.
summary.zh: 用於向在地商家銷售的行銷自動化平台。

highlight.en: Resquared holds data on every US local business and pairs it with marketing automation, saving sales pros over 3 hours a day and yielding 53% stronger leads.
highlight.zh: Resquared 掌握全美每一家在地商家的資料,搭配行銷自動化工具,為業務每天省下逾 3 小時並帶來 53% 更優質的潛在客戶。

summary.en: Makes it easy for tech platforms to embed insurance into products.
summary.zh: 讓科技平台輕鬆將保險嵌入產品。

highlight.en: Tint provides a simple API spanning underwriting software, insurer access, and compliance, powering embedded insurance like Outdoorsy's RV-rental coverage.
highlight.zh: Tint 提供涵蓋核保軟體、保險公司接入與合規的簡單 API,為 Outdoorsy 的 RV 租賃保險等嵌入式保險提供動力。

summary.en: Plaid for Southeast Asia.
summary.zh: 東南亞版的 Plaid。

highlight.en: Finantier provides the infrastructure and data products businesses need to build the next generation of financial services in Southeast Asia.
highlight.zh: Finantier 提供企業在東南亞打造下一代金融服務所需的基礎設施與資料產品。

summary.en: All-electric seagliders for fast, affordable regional transportation.
summary.zh: 全電動海上滑翔機,提供快速平價的區域運輸。

highlight.en: REGENT's all-electric hydrofoiling seaglider flies within a wingspan of the water, going twice as far as electric aircraft while being regulated as a maritime vessel for cheaper market entry.
highlight.zh: REGENT 的全電動水翼海上滑翔機貼著水面、在一個翼展高度內飛行,航程是電動飛機的兩倍,並以海事法規管理而能以更低成本進入市場。

summary.en: Robots that automate the everyday tasks of microbiologists.
summary.zh: 自動化微生物學家日常工作的機器人。

highlight.en: Reshape Biotech builds a separate, easy-to-use robot for each lab function, from filling plates to analyzing images, instead of one over-complicated do-everything machine.
highlight.zh: Reshape Biotech 為每項實驗室功能打造一台簡單易用的機器人,從填盤到影像分析,而非一台過於複雜的萬能機器。

summary.en: Open-source alternative to Datadog.
summary.zh: Datadog 的開源替代方案。

highlight.en: SigNoz is an OpenTelemetry-native observability platform combining logs, traces, and metrics in one open-source app, an alternative to Datadog and New Relic.
highlight.zh: SigNoz 是以 OpenTelemetry 為原生的可觀測性平台,將日誌、追蹤與指標整合於單一開源應用,為 Datadog、New Relic 的替代方案。

summary.en: AI recruiter that runs outbound sourcing campaigns to find top talent.
summary.zh: 以外撥招募活動尋找頂尖人才的 AI 招募工具。

highlight.en: Weekday has built a 250M+ person talent database for the US and India and runs outbound campaigns with 30-40% response rates to source candidates for any role.
highlight.zh: Weekday 建立涵蓋美國與印度逾 2.5 億人的人才資料庫,以外撥活動達 30-40% 回覆率,為各類職缺尋找人選。

summary.en: All-in-one HR management platform for SMEs.
summary.zh: 為中小企業打造的一體化人資管理平台。

highlight.en: BrioHR digitizes the full employee journey in one place, from applicant tracking and onboarding to leave, payroll, expenses, and performance management.
highlight.zh: BrioHR 將完整的員工旅程數位化於同一處,涵蓋求職者追蹤、入職、請假、薪資、報銷與績效管理。

summary.en: Learn, intern, and become industry-ready.
summary.zh: 學習、實習,做好進入產業的準備。

highlight.en: Unschool is a marketplace where Indian college students learn technology, management, and arts through expert-built courses, filling gaps colleges leave.
highlight.zh: Unschool 是讓印度大學生透過專家打造的課程學習技術、管理與藝術的市集,補足大學教育的不足。

summary.en: Buying and growing profitable e-commerce companies on Amazon and DTC.
summary.zh: 收購並擴展在 Amazon 與 DTC 上獲利的電商公司。

highlight.en: Moonshot Brands acquires profitable Amazon and Shopify e-commerce companies from founders, then scales them globally with its data-driven technology platform.
highlight.zh: Moonshot Brands 向創辦人收購在 Amazon 與 Shopify 上獲利的電商公司,再以其數據驅動的技術平台拓展至全球。

summary.en: Reinventing lifelong learning for the future of work.
summary.zh: 為未來工作重塑終身學習。

highlight.en: Awari replaces master's degrees in Brazil with cohort-based courses featuring hands-on learning and sessions led by experts from Rappi, Nubank, Apple, and Google.
highlight.zh: Awari 以同梯次課程取代巴西的碩士學位,結合實作學習與來自 Rappi、Nubank、Apple、Google 等專家帶領的課程。

summary.en: Interactive product demos.
summary.zh: 互動式產品演示。

highlight.en: Navattic helps sales and marketing teams instantly create interactive product demos.
highlight.zh: Navattic 協助銷售與行銷團隊即時製作互動式產品演示。

summary.en: The largest B2B eCommerce platform for SMBs in Latin America.
summary.zh: 拉丁美洲最大的中小企業 B2B 電商平台。

highlight.en: Boitas.com is a B2B food-service platform letting restaurants, hotels, and cafeterias order all their supplies in one place from a phone or computer.
highlight.zh: Boitas.com 是 B2B 餐飲服務平台,讓餐廳、飯店與餐廳能在同一處透過手機或電腦訂購所有供應品。

summary.en: Management and analytics software for convenience stores.
summary.zh: 便利商店的管理與分析軟體。

highlight.en: SwiftSku connects to convenience-store point-of-sale systems in real time, letting owners remotely manage stores with predictive analytics, dashboards, and reports.
highlight.zh: SwiftSku 即時連接便利商店的銷售點系統,讓店主以預測分析、儀表板與報表遠端管理門市。

summary.en: Stripe for online identity verification.
summary.zh: 線上身分驗證版的 Stripe。

highlight.en: Authologic is an orchestration layer aggregating local KYC and AML methods, letting businesses verify clients via biometrics, banking data, and government digital IDs through one API.
highlight.zh: Authologic 是聚合在地 KYC 與 AML 方法的編排層,讓企業透過單一 API 以生物辨識、銀行資料與政府數位身分驗證客戶。

summary.en: Streamline your debt capital raise and management.
summary.zh: 簡化債務資本的募集與管理。

highlight.en: Finley's software automates due diligence, compliance, and reporting with capital providers for companies like Ramp, Arc, and Parafin, backed by Bain Capital Ventures.
highlight.zh: Finley 的軟體為 Ramp、Arc、Parafin 等公司自動化與資金提供方的盡職調查、合規與報表作業,由 Bain Capital Ventures 支持。
